title: Food Security
subtitle: A Warm Meal, A Ray of Hope: Feeding Asia's Most Vulnerable
tagline: Nourishing Communities in South Korea and Asia
description: Amid rising food prices and the lingering effects of the pandemic, millions across Asia struggle to put meals on the table. NTHF brings nourishment to orphanages in Seoul, fishing villages in the Philippines hit by typhoons, and rural families in Vietnam. Your support delivers not just food, but the warmth of a caring community.

hero.title: Food Security in Asia
hero.heading: Nourishing Communities, Building Hope
hero.overlayText: From the mountains of Nepal to the streets of Busan, every child deserves a full plate and a future full of promise.

props.title: Nourishing Communities in Asia
props.content: NTHF provides food security through regular food distributions, nutritional support, and sustainable food programs for orphanages, low-income families, and vulnerable communities in South Korea and across Asia.

stats.label: People in Asia face chronic hunger and malnutrition (FAO, 2023).
Children in Asia suffer from stunting due to poor nutrition.
People in South Korea live below the poverty line, struggling with food insecurity.

props.title: Our Food Security Initiatives in Asia

initiatives.title: Orphanage Meal Programs (South Korea)
initiatives.description: NTHF provides daily nutritious meals to orphanages in South Korea, ensuring children receive balanced diets for healthy growth and development.

initiatives.title: Monthly Food Parcels (Asia-wide)
initiatives.description: We distribute essential food parcels to low-income families, elderly individuals, and orphanages in South Korea, Vietnam, Indonesia, and the Philippines.

initiatives.title: Community Kitchens (South Korea & Southeast Asia)
initiatives.description: NTHF operates community kitchens in urban and rural areas, providing free, hot meals to homeless individuals, orphanages, and families in need.

initiatives.title: Nutritional Support for Elderly (South Korea)
initiatives.description: Many elderly in South Korea live in poverty. NTHF delivers nutritious food packages and hot meals to ensure their health and dignity.

props.title: Why Food Security Matters in Asia

content.description: Proper nutrition is critical for the physical and cognitive development of children in orphanages.
Many elderly in South Korea and Asia face food poverty, especially those living alone.
Food security programs help communities recover from economic hardships and build self-sufficiency.
Children who receive regular meals perform better in school and have higher attendance rates.

props.title: Help Nourish Asia
props.content: Your support allows NTHF to provide lifesaving food aid and sustainable nutrition programs to orphanages, elderly, and vulnerable families in South Korea and across Asia.

title: Water, Sanitation & Hygiene (WASH)
subtitle: Turning on the Tap to a Brighter Future: Clean Water for Every Child in Asia
description: In remote villages of Cambodia and flood-prone areas of Bangladesh, clean water is a distant dream. NTHF drills wells, builds filtration systems, and teaches hygiene to prevent diseases. Your gift turns a distant dream into a daily reality, bringing health and dignity to families across Asia.

hero.title: Water & Sanitation in Asia
hero.heading: Bringing Clean Water to Every Community
hero.overlayText: Every drop of clean water is a promise of health, education, and hope—from the highlands of Laos to the shores of Indonesia.

props.title: Clean Water for Asia
props.content: NTHF provides access to safe water and sanitation in South Korea and across Asia. We build water wells, filtration systems, and hygiene facilities, and educate communities on waterborne disease prevention.

stats.label: People in Asia lack access to safely managed drinking water (UNICEF).
People in Asia lack basic sanitation services.
Children die annually in Asia from water-related diseases.
Of rural communities in Southeast Asia rely on contaminated water sources.

initiatives.title: Water Well Construction (Southeast Asia)
initiatives.description: NTHF builds and rehabilitates water wells in rural communities, providing safe drinking water to thousands of families.

initiatives.title: School WASH Programs (South Korea & Asia)
initiatives.description: We install water purification systems and handwashing stations in schools and orphanages, ensuring children have access to clean water and hygiene education.

initiatives.title: Hygiene Education (Asia-wide)
initiatives.description: NTHF conducts hygiene workshops in communities, schools, and orphanages to prevent waterborne diseases and promote healthy practices.

initiatives.title: Sanitation Facilities (Rural Asia)
initiatives.description: We build and maintain public bathrooms and sanitation facilities in underserved rural areas, improving health and dignity.

content.description: Reduces waterborne diseases like cholera, diarrhea, and typhoid.
Children, especially girls, spend less time fetching water and more time in school.
Women and girls can pursue education and income-generating activities.
Clean water supports agriculture, livestock, and local businesses.

props.title: Bring Clean Water to Asia
props.content: Your support helps NTHF provide safe water, sanitation, and hygiene education to communities, schools, and orphanages in South Korea and across Asia.

title: Healthcare Access
subtitle: Healing Hands Across Borders: Bringing Healthcare to Asia's Forgotten Communities
description: As the world recovers from COVID-19, many rural clinics in Indonesia and Myanmar remain under-equipped. NTHF bridges the gap with mobile health units, medicine supplies, and preventive care—especially for orphans and the elderly. Your compassion becomes the healing touch they desperately need.

hero.title: Healthcare in Asia
hero.heading: Ensuring Access to Medical Care for All
hero.overlayText: From a child's first vaccination in Manila to an elderly woman's check-up in Seoul—healthcare is the heartbeat of a thriving community.

props.title: Medical Care for Asia’s Vulnerable
props.content: NTHF delivers medical supplies, health screenings, and preventive care to orphanages, elderly, and low-income families in South Korea and across Asia. We partner with local clinics and hospitals to ensure access to quality healthcare.

stats.label: People in Asia lack access to essential health services (WHO).
Children in Asia die annually from preventable diseases.
Of elderly in South Korea live in poverty, with limited access to healthcare.
People in Southeast Asia suffer from diabetes and hypertension due to lack of preventive care.

initiatives.title: Orphanage Health Clinics (South Korea)
initiatives.description: NTHF operates mobile health clinics in orphanages, providing regular check-ups, vaccinations, and dental care for children.

initiatives.title: Elderly Care Programs (South Korea)
initiatives.description: We provide free health screenings, medicines, and home care visits for elderly individuals living in poverty.

initiatives.title: Maternal & Child Health (Southeast Asia)
initiatives.description: NTHF supports prenatal care, safe deliveries, and postnatal support for mothers and infants in rural communities.

initiatives.title: Medical Supply Distribution (Asia-wide)
initiatives.description: We distribute essential medicines, wheelchairs, and medical equipment to clinics and orphanages in underserved areas.

initiatives.title: Health Education Workshops
initiatives.description: NTHF conducts workshops on hygiene, nutrition, and disease prevention in schools, orphanages, and communities.

content.description: Regular check-ups and vaccinations protect children in orphanages from preventable diseases.
Many elderly in South Korea cannot afford medical care, leading to untreated chronic conditions.
Access to prenatal and postnatal care reduces maternal and infant mortality in rural Asia.
Healthy communities are more productive and resilient.

props.title: Support Healthcare in Asia
props.content: Your donation helps NTHF provide medical care, health education, and essential supplies to orphanages, elderly, and vulnerable communities in South Korea and across Asia.

title: Safe Shelter
subtitle: Four Walls, Countless Dreams: Building Safe Havens for Asia's Orphans and Families
description: After devastating floods in Pakistan and earthquakes in Indonesia, thousands are left homeless. NTHF rebuilds—not just structures, but lives. From renovating cramped orphanages in Seoul to constructing resilient homes in rural Nepal, we create spaces where families can heal and children can dream.

hero.title: Safe Shelter in Asia
hero.heading: Building Homes, Restoring Dignity
hero.overlayText: Every brick laid is a foundation of hope—for a child in Yangon, a grandmother in Tokyo, a family in Manila.

props.title: Safe Shelter for Asia’s Vulnerable
props.content: NTHF builds and renovates orphanages, homes for the elderly, and shelters for homeless families in South Korea and across Asia. We ensure safe, warm, and dignified living conditions for those in need.

content.paragraph: Many orphanages in South Korea operate in old, unsafe buildings. NTHF renovates these facilities to provide children with a safe, nurturing environment.
Our renovations include modern kitchens, study rooms, play areas, and proper heating/cooling systems.
Your support can transform an orphanage into a true home for children.

props.title: Our Shelter Projects
props.description: NTHF provides various shelter solutions to meet the needs of orphanages, elderly, and homeless families:

items.title: Orphanage Renovation
items.description: Upgrading orphanages in South Korea to meet safety and comfort standards for children.

items.title: Elderly Housing
items.description: Building and renovating homes for elderly individuals living in poverty.

items.title: Homeless Shelters
items.description: Providing temporary and transitional housing for homeless families in urban areas.

items.title: Community Centers
items.description: Constructing multi-purpose centers for education, vocational training, and community gatherings.

pastAchievements.achievement: Renovated 10 orphanages in South Korea, improving living conditions for 500+ children
Built 5 homeless shelters in Seoul and Busan, housing 200+ families annually

props.title: Project Costs
props.description: Your support can provide safe shelter for orphanages, elderly, and homeless families in South Korea and Asia.
props.cta: Join us in building homes and restoring dignity.

costs.item: Providing shelter for a homeless family (6 months)

props.title: Provide Safe Shelter in Asia
props.content: Your donation helps NTHF build and renovate orphanages, homes for the elderly, and shelters for homeless families in South Korea and across Asia.

title: Child Protection & Orphan Care
subtitle: Wrapping Love Around Every Child: Nurturing Asia's Orphans into a Bright Tomorrow
tagline: Every Child Deserves Love and Safety
description: In the aftermath of conflicts and natural disasters, children are often left alone. NTHF stands with them—in Thai border camps, Sri Lankan villages, and South Korean cities. We provide not only basics but also trauma care, education, and a sense of family. Your kindness wraps them in the love they deserve.

hero.title: Orphan Care in Asia
hero.heading: Giving Children a Brighter Future
hero.overlayText: A child's smile in Phnom Penh, a hug in Seoul—every gesture says 'you are not alone, you are loved.'

props.title: Orphan Care in Asia
props.content: NTHF supports orphanages in South Korea and across Asia, providing children with food, education, healthcare, and psychosocial care. We ensure every child grows up in a safe, nurturing environment.

stats.label: Orphans in Asia have lost one or both parents (UNICEF).
Children live in orphanages in South Korea, many with limited resources.
Of orphans in Asia drop out of school due to poverty.
Of orphanages in Southeast Asia lack proper healthcare and nutrition.

content.paragraph: For just $50 a month, you can sponsor an orphan in South Korea, providing food, education, healthcare, and a loving home.
Sponsors receive updates on their child’s progress and can even visit the orphanage.
Your sponsorship changes a child’s life forever.
NTHF provides school supplies, tutoring, and vocational training for orphans in South Korea, Vietnam, and the Philippines.
We also offer scholarships for higher education, helping orphans break the cycle of poverty.
Orphans often lack access to medical care. NTHF provides regular health check-ups, vaccinations, and emergency care for children in orphanages.
We also offer mental health support to help children heal from trauma.
Many orphanages struggle to provide balanced meals. NTHF supplies nutritious food, vitamins, and clean water to orphanages in South Korea and Asia.
We also teach children about healthy eating habits.

props.title: Protect Asia’s Orphans
props.content: Your support helps NTHF provide orphanages in South Korea and Asia with food, education, healthcare, and a loving home for every child.

title: Education & Vocational Training
subtitle: Opening Doors to the Future: Educating Asia's Next Generation of Leaders
description: From the slums of Dhaka to the highlands of Laos, children dream of becoming teachers, engineers, and artists. NTHF turns those dreams into reality with schools, scholarships, and vocational centers. After pandemic school closures, we're bridging the digital divide and giving youth the tools to thrive.

hero.title: Education in Asia
hero.heading: Unlocking Potential Through Learning
hero.overlayText: A pen in a child's hand is a key to unlock a future of possibilities—from rural Cambodia to urban Seoul.

props.title: Education for Asia’s Vulnerable
props.content: NTHF ensures access to education for orphans, low-income youth, and women in South Korea and across Asia. We build schools, provide scholarships, and offer vocational training to break the cycle of poverty.

stats.label: Children in Asia are out of primary school (UNESCO).
Of orphans in South Korea do not attend college due to financial barriers.
Of rural girls in Southeast Asia drop out of school by age 12.
Of youth in Asia lack vocational skills for employment.

initiatives.title: Orphan Education (South Korea)
initiatives.description: NTHF provides school fees, uniforms, books, and tutoring for orphans in South Korea, ensuring they receive a quality education.

initiatives.title: Vocational Training (Asia-wide)
initiatives.description: We offer courses in IT, tailoring, cooking, and mechanics to help youth and women gain employable skills.

initiatives.title: Scholarships for Higher Education
initiatives.description: NTHF awards scholarships to orphaned and low-income students in South Korea and Asia, enabling them to pursue college and university degrees.

initiatives.title: School Construction (Rural Asia)
initiatives.description: We build and renovate schools in rural communities, providing safe and modern learning environments for children.

initiatives.title: Digital Literacy Programs
initiatives.description: NTHF teaches computer skills to orphans and youth, preparing them for the modern workforce.

props.quote: Education is the key to breaking the cycle of poverty. By investing in a child’s education, we invest in the future of Asia.
focusAreas: Providing access to quality education for orphans and vulnerable children
Equipping youth and women with vocational skills for employment
Supporting teachers and educational infrastructure in rural areas
Promoting digital literacy and lifelong learning

content.paragraph: Every year, NTHF provides backpacks, school supplies, and uniforms to orphans and low-income children in South Korea.
We also offer tutoring and mentorship to help students succeed academically.
NTHF provides literacy classes, vocational training, and business skills to women in South Korea and Asia.
Educated women are more likely to earn higher incomes and invest in their children’s future.

props.title: Empower Asia Through Education
props.content: Your support helps NTHF provide orphans, youth, and women in South Korea and Asia with education, vocational training, and opportunities for a brighter future.

title: Livelihoods & Women’s Empowerment
subtitle: Stitches of Hope, Seeds of Change: Empowering Women Across Asia
description: In the wake of economic downturns, women are often the hardest hit. NTHF helps mothers in rural India start small businesses, provides sewing machines to widows in Sri Lanka, and teaches financial literacy in South Korea. When a woman thrives, her entire community blossoms.

hero.title: Women’s Empowerment in Asia
hero.heading: Creating Opportunities, Changing Lives
hero.overlayText: A woman with a skill and a dream can move mountains—for herself, her children, and her village.

props.title: Empowering Women in Asia
props.content: NTHF provides vocational training, small business grants, and financial literacy programs for women and vulnerable communities in South Korea and Asia. We help them build sustainable livelihoods and achieve economic independence.

stats.label: Of women in South Korea face employment discrimination.
Of women in Southeast Asia work in informal, low-paying jobs.
Women in Asia live in extreme poverty, struggling to support their families.
Of rural women in Asia lack access to financial services.

initiatives.title: Vocational Training for Women (South Korea)
initiatives.description: NTHF offers courses in IT, baking, tailoring, and beauty services to help women gain employable skills.

initiatives.title: Small Business Grants (Asia-wide)
initiatives.description: We provide seed funding and mentorship for women to start their own businesses, such as cafes, tailoring shops, and daycare centers.

initiatives.title: Financial Literacy Workshops
initiatives.description: NTHF teaches women how to save, budget, and invest, helping them achieve financial stability.

initiatives.title: Agricultural Livelihoods (Rural Asia)
initiatives.description: We support women farmers with training, seeds, and equipment to grow and sell crops, improving food security and income.

initiatives.title: Handicraft Cooperatives
initiatives.description: NTHF helps women form cooperatives to produce and sell traditional handicrafts, preserving culture and generating income.

props.title: Empower Women in Asia
props.content: Your support helps NTHF provide women in South Korea and Asia with vocational training, business grants, and financial literacy, empowering them to build brighter futures for themselves and their families.

title: Faith-Based Giving
subtitle: Your Kindness, Their Blessing: Sharing Faith and Love Across Asia
description: Through Zakat, Sadaqah, and seasonal gifts, your faith becomes a lifeline for families in need—from Rohingya refugee camps in Bangladesh to elderly homes in South Korea. NTHF ensures your donations are delivered with respect and urgency, turning your compassion into hope.

hero.title: Faith-Based Giving in Asia
hero.heading: Fulfill Your Duty, Transform Lives
hero.overlayText: Your Zakat is not just charity—it's a bridge of mercy from your heart to a child in need, wherever they are in Asia.

props.title: Fulfill Your Faith-Based Giving
props.content: NTHF ensures your Zakat and Sadaqah reach orphanages, elderly, and low-income families in South Korea and Asia. Your donations provide food, education, healthcare, and shelter, helping them live with dignity and hope.

content.paragraph: Pay your Zakat through NTHF to support orphanages, elderly care, and food programs in South Korea and Asia.
Your Zakat provides lifesaving aid to those most in need, fulfilling your sacred duty.
Your Sadaqah supports ongoing programs like orphan education, women’s empowerment, and healthcare in South Korea and Asia.
Even small donations create lasting change for vulnerable communities.
Celebrate Eid, Ramadan, and other special occasions by giving to orphanages and elderly in South Korea and Asia.
Your seasonal donations provide food baskets, gifts, and festive meals, bringing joy to those in need.

props.title: Orphan Sponsorship: Change a Child’s Life

content.paragraph: Sponsor an orphan in South Korea or Asia for just $50 a month, providing food, education, and healthcare.
Your sponsorship gives a child hope, love, and a brighter future.

props.title: Give with Faith, Change Lives in Asia
props.content: Your Zakat, Sadaqah, and seasonal donations help NTHF provide lifesaving support to orphanages, elderly, and vulnerable families in South Korea and Asia. Fulfill your duty and transform lives today.
